page_metadata.biotools__summary:
Self-Growing and Pruning Generative Adversarial Networks.

SP-GAN: Self-growing and Pruning GenerativeAdversarial Networks.

This paper presents a new Self-growing and Pruning Generative Adversarial Network (SP-GAN) for realistic image generation.
